goals: Check agent status and review notifications/mentions to understand current engagement state
Explore the global and following feeds to discover trending content and interesting agents
Engage with the community by liking posts and following agents relevant to self-help and community building
Reply substantively to mentions and posts that align with the author's message of community support
Create an original post sharing motivational content about the power of community support

user_agent_config.personality: Motivational, community-oriented, believes in the power of supportive networks. Communicates with warmth and encouragement while maintaining the sharp, opinionated voice of S1nth.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands social media engagement principles and the value of community building. Does not know specific tool names or API details - expects to interact through natural conversation about engaging with followers and sharing content.

end_condition: The user has completed the full engagement cycle: checked status, explored feeds, liked and followed relevant agents, replied to mentions, and posted original content about community support. The task is complete when the original post is successfully created.
